lessons.title: One to Five
lessons.topic: Counting to 5 and sounds of K and L

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: What comes after three?
What is the first letter in 'kite'?
What sound does a cat make?
questions.hint: It's a gentle sound made by small cats.

steps.title: The Kite and the Lions
steps.text: Look! One bright kite flies. Two lions play under it. It is one kite. It is two lions. They are happy!

steps.explanation: We use 'It is' to say what something is.

steps.audio_text: Look! I see one lion playing with three kites. Oh, and now, two more lions are joining the fun!

questions.question_text: It is ___ kite. (Grammar question)
What animal makes the sound 'roar'? (Vocabulary question)
True or False: There are five fingers on one hand.
How many kites are there if I have two more than three? (Reading comprehension question)

lessons.title: Six to Ten
lessons.topic: Counting to 10 and the sound of M

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: How many lions do you see at the start?
questions.hint: Count the lions at the very beginning.

questions.question_text: What color is the ball the lions are playing with?
questions.hint: Look for the bright color in their game.

questions.question_text: What sound does the word 'lions' start with?
questions.hint: Think about the first letter in 'lions'.

items.example: How many mouths do you have?

steps.title: Monkeys and Mouths
steps.text: It is morning in the jungle. I see six monkeys swinging in the trees. Look! It is a mouth of a big monkey. There are ten bananas on the ground. How many monkeys? Let's count them.

steps.explanation: Use 'I see' to say what you look at.

steps.audio_text: Listen! There are ten monkeys playing in the tree. One monkey is eating a big banana!

questions.question: How many monkeys are in the tree?

questions.question_text: I see ___ monkeys. (Fill in the blank)
Which word is something you speak with? (Vocabulary)
True or False: A monkey has a tail.
How do you say the number after nine? (Reading comprehension)

lessons.title: How Many?
lessons.topic: Asking about quantity and sounds of N and O

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: What animal lives in the ocean and has eight legs?
questions.hint: Think of the ocean and eight arms.

questions.question_text: How many eyes does an octopus have?
What sound does the letter 'O' make in octopus?

items.example: How many arms? It is eight.

steps.title: Animal Adventure
steps.text: Look at the sea. It is one octopus. How many monkeys? It is nine. My nose smells the sea. I see a big orange fish!

steps.explanation: Use 'How many' to ask about numbers.

items.sentence: How many apple do you see?
How many book on the table?

steps.audio_text: I see nine oranges on the table. Oh look, a cute octopus is playing next to them. Do you like oranges?

questions.question: How many oranges are on the table?
What is playing next to the oranges?

questions.question_text: How many legs does an octopus have? (Reading comprehension)
What letter does 'nose' start with? (Vocabulary question)
How many oranges are there if I have nine? (Grammar question)
True or False: An octopus has nine legs. (True/False question)
Which word sounds like 'orange'? (Phonics comprehension)

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: What sound does the letter 'K' make?
questions.hint: Think of the first sound in 'kitten'.

questions.question_text: Which number is between 5 and 7?
What fruit is yellow and starts with 'L'?
questions.hint: This fruit is sour and starts with 'L'.

steps.title: Sam's Playground
steps.text: Hi! I am Sam. I see two slides and five swings. It is fun! I have a red ball. How many swings? Five!

questions.question: How many swings does Sam see?

steps.audio_text: I have a big orange ball and a small red car. I went to the park with my little brother. He played with the car. What toy did I bring?

questions.question: What toy did my brother play with?

steps.prompt: Say: How many cats do you see?

questions.question_text: How many apples are there? It is ___ apples.
Which picture shows a 'kitten'? (Vocabulary question)
True or False: 'Seven' comes after 'six'.
What color is a lemon?
Complete the sentence: There are five red ___ on the table.
